user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Platter
fields.short_description: A hearty American-style breakfast with scrambled eggs, crispy bacon or turkey bacon, golden hash browns, buttered toast, and a side of fresh fruit.
fields.meal_suggestion: Scramble two eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook 2–3 slices of bacon until crisp (or turkey bacon for a leaner option). Pan-fry shredded or diced potatoes until golden and crispy to make hash browns. Toast two slices of whole-grain or sourdough bread and spread lightly with butter. Plate with a small side of mixed fresh fruit (berries, orange segments, or sliced apple). Serve with coffee or orange juice.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides a balanced mix of protein (eggs, bacon), carbohydrates (toast, potatoes), and fruit for vitamins and fiber. Choose turkey bacon or leaner cooking methods and whole-grain bread to reduce saturated fat and increase fiber for a more heart-healthy version.

result.reasoning: Day 7 breakfast already contains Greek-influenced items; appending a Classic American Breakfast Platter as a POI offers a distinct, familiar alternative. Position -1 appends it after existing breakfast options.
